zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronilla Craon於大約1175年出生在英國諾福爾可特尼時，她的父親Guy de Craon II11173歲，母親Isabel Basset21歲。她於大約1190年與William de Longchamp結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1262年4月11日在她的家鄉享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronilla Craon于大约1175年出生在英国諾福爾可特尼时，她的父亲Guy de Craon II11173岁，母亲Isabel Basset21岁。她于大约1190年与William de Longchamp结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1262年4月11日在她的家乡享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Craine
meanings: Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac (Giolla) Ciaráin ‘son of (the devotee of) Ciarán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of Gaelic ciar, Manx keeir ‘black’. The place Ballacraine on the Isle of Man means ‘Craine's farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronilla Craon was born about 1175, in Pentney, Norfolk, England, her father, Guy de Craon II, was 11173 and her mother, Isabel Basset, was 21. She married William de Longchamp about 1190. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 11 April 1262, in her hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronilla Craon est née environ 1175, à Pentney, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Guy de Craon II, avait 11173 ans et sa mère, Isabel Basset, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William de Longchamp environ 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 avril 1262, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Petronilla Craon um 1175 in Pentney, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Craon II 11173 und ihre Mutter Isabel Basset 21. Sie hat um 1190 William de Longchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 11. April 1262 im Alter von 88 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Craon è nata il circa 1175 nel Pentney, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Guy de Craon II, aveva 11173 anni e sua madre, Isabel Basset, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William de Longchamp circa 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 11 aprile 1262, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronilla Craonが約1175年にイギリスノーフォルクペントニーで生まれた時，父Guy de Craon IIは11173歳，母Isabel Bassetは21歳であった。約1190年にWilliam de Longchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1262年4月11日に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla Craon(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 노르폴크 펜트니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Craon II(은)는 11173세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Basset(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 William de Longchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1262년 4월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Craon nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Pentney, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Guy de Craon II, tinha 11173 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Basset, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Longchamp aproximadamente 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 11 de abril de 1262, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronilla Craon родилась около 1175 г. в местности пентни, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Guy de Craon II было 11173 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Basset, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Longchamp около 1190 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 11 апреля 1262 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Petronilla Craon nació aproximadamente 1175, en Pentney, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Guy de Craon II, tenía 11173 años y su mamá, Isabel Basset, tenía 21 años. Se casó con William de Longchamp aproximadamente 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 11 de abril de 1262, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años.
